name: Roast Loin of Pork
recipeIngredient: 5 lb Boneless Top Loin Roast; Pork
2 Tablespoons Ground Red Chiles; To Taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pork roast in a shallow glass or plastic dish.
2. Mix ground red chiles, lime juice, 1 teaspoon salt, cumin, oregano, pepper, garlic, and 1/4 cup of orange juice concentrate in a bowl.
3. Brush the mixture onto the pork roast.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 8 hours.
5. Preheat the oven to 325 Degrees F (165 Degrees C).
6. Place the pork, fat side up, on a rack in a shallow roasting pan.
7. Insert a meat thermometer into the center of the thickest part of the roast, ensuring it does not rest in fat.
8. Roast uncovered until the thermometer registers 170 degrees F (77 degrees C), about 2 to 2 and a half hours.
9. Remove the pork and rack from the pan.
10. Strain the drippings from the pan and set aside.
11. Add enough water to the remaining orange juice concentrate to measure 3/4 cup, then stir in the juice and wine.
12. Stir in sour cream and salt.
13. Serve with the pork roast.
